dashboard_surfaces.action: Reduced to minimal status line: heartbeat dot + 'System ready' + task count. Internal telemetry (Server online/Worker running) hidden. Operator doesn't need to monitor backend process state.
dashboard_surfaces.after: Single line: status dot + 'System ready' + 'X tasks completed'

dashboard_surfaces.reason: Critical — shows what needs operator attention

dashboard_surfaces.action: Renamed to 'Needs Attention'. Removed: Mission Health (raw states), By Engine (duplicates Engines screen), Proactive Suggestions (legacy copy, user-specific). Kept: Next Best Actions + Blockers only when actionable. Panel hidden when nothing needs attention.
dashboard_surfaces.before: 5 sections: Next Actions, Suggested Tasks, By Engine, Mission Health, Blockers
dashboard_surfaces.after: 1-2 sections: Needs Attention actions + Blockers. Hidden when empty.

dashboard_surfaces.reason: Raw internal state labels ('drifting', 'no statement') are not product-grade. This information belongs in the Engines screen if needed.

dashboard_surfaces.surface: By Engine section in Chief of Staff
dashboard_surfaces.reason: Duplicates the Engines screen. Dashboard should show actions, not architecture.

dashboard_surfaces.surface: Proactive Suggestions in Chief of Staff
